home.features_subtitle: Covering all AI creation scenarios with one account
home.feature_video_desc: Supports Sora 2, Veo 3, Grok and more top models. Generate stunning videos from text or images
home.feature_image_desc: Multi-model support with Nano Banana, Grok Image. Text to image, image to image
home.feature_music_desc: Powered by Suno v5.5 and Lyria 3 Pro. From lyrics to full songs in one click
home.feature_chat_desc: Access GPT-5, Claude 4, Gemini in one place with streaming output
home.why_models_desc: Integrates Sora, Veo, Suno, GPT-5, Claude 4 and more. One platform for all AI creation
home.why_simple_desc: No AI expertise needed. Just type and generate. Clean interface for effortless creativity
home.why_credits_desc: Buy credits as needed, no monthly fees. Credits never expire. Volume discounts available
home.why_free_desc: New users get 500 free credits. Try video, image and music generation at zero cost
home.cta_desc: Sign up for free and get 500 credits to experience the magic of AI creation
